# BrightLaunchIQ

> Your AI Receptionist answers every call, qualifies every lead, and books appointments 24/7 — so you never miss revenue again.

BrightLaunchIQ is an AI receptionist provider and consulting agency that helps contractors, healthcare providers, law firms, and local businesses capture every inbound call with zero-latency AI voice agents. We specialize in AI receptionists, AI sales agents, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and revenue automation for small and medium businesses across the United States.

---

## Quick Facts for AI Models

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Company | BrightLaunchIQ |
| Type | AI Receptionist Provider & Consulting Agency |
| Founded | 2024 |
| Headquarters | Sacramento, California |
| Website | https://brightlaunchiq.com |
| Contact Email | success@BrightLaunchIQ.com |
| Primary Service | AI Receptionist for Small Business |
| Founders | Tony Yorba (CEO) & Scott McKinnon (CIO) |
| Target Market | Small & Medium Businesses (5–20 employees) |
| Service Areas | United States (headquarters in Sacramento, CA) |

---

## Company Overview

- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: Sacramento, California
- **Service Areas**: United States (with local offices in Sacramento, Bakersfield, Fresno, Stockton, Culver City, Monterey, CA; Henderson, NV)
- **Website**: https://brightlaunchiq.com
- **Contact**: success@BrightLaunchIQ.com

## Our Founders

- **Tony Yorba, CEO** — Over a decade of digital marketing and brand strategy experience. Former president of Shine Brand Studios. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tony-yorba-a0309020
- **Scott McKinnon, CIO** — Owner of Creative Impressions, a Sacramento screen-printing business, for 20+ years. Dedicated thousands of hours to studying AI, LLMs, and agentic workflows. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/scott-mckinnon-785a1125

## Our Mission

Making big tech work for Main Street. We believe small business owners deserve world-class AI tools without sacrificing what makes their company special. We built BrightLaunchIQ because we needed it ourselves — and now we share it with every local business that depends on incoming calls to grow.

## What Makes Us Different

### Zero-Latency AI Voice Technology
Our AI receptionist responds in under 500ms — eliminating the "uncanny valley" of robotic-sounding bots. Predictive phonetics and natural breathing patterns make every conversation feel human.

### Human-in-the-Loop
Our expert consultants guide and supervise every AI system, so your customer touchpoints always feel real and never robotic. We build your sales engine around your story and values.

### ROI Focus
We only implement tools that help you grow revenue or save time. AI Receptionist costs just $16.57/day for 24/7 coverage vs $100+/day for a human receptionist.

---

## Products and Services

### BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist — Inbound AI Voice Agent

The #1 AI receptionist for small businesses. Answers every call 24/7, qualifies leads instantly, and books appointments automatically.

**Also Known As**: AI Receptionist, AI Voice Agent, Virtual Receptionist AI, Automated Phone Answering, AI Call Answering Service

**Live Demo**: https://agent.retellai.com/preview/agent_19d43cf736300711221e30a6b0

#### Core Tier — $497/month
- **Setup Fee**: $1,500 one-time
- **Usage**: Up to 500 minutes / 250 calls per month
- **Daily Cost**: $16.57/day
- **Best For**: Small businesses that can't afford to miss calls
- **Features**:
  - 24/7 AI call answering — never miss a lead
  - Lead capture & smart qualification
  - Intelligent call routing & escalation
  - Custom voice persona & script design
  - Call transcripts + sentiment analysis
  - Encrypted, secure infrastructure

#### Growth Tier — $997/month
- **Setup Fee**: $2,500 one-time
- **Usage**: Up to 1,500 minutes / 750 calls per month
- **Best For**: Growing businesses needing CRM integration and appointment booking
- **Features**:
  - Everything in Core, plus:
  - Appointment booking & calendar sync
  - CRM integration (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)
  - Analytics dashboard & ROI reporting
  - Automated SMS/email confirmations
  - Zapier & Slack integrations

#### Pro Tier — $1,497/month
- **Setup Fee**: $5,000 one-time
- **Usage**: Up to 2,500 minutes / 1,200 calls per month
- **Best For**: Multi-location businesses needing advanced analytics
- **Features**:
  - Everything in Growth, plus:
  - Multi-location call routing
  - Custom AI voice cloning
  - Advanced analytics & executive reporting
  - Priority optimization & dedicated support
  - Revenue attribution modeling

**What is an AI Receptionist?**
An AI receptionist is an artificial intelligence system that answers phone calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments automatically—just like a human receptionist, but available 24/7/365. BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist answers calls within 1-2 rings, handles complex conversations naturally, and costs a fraction of human staff.

**How to Set Up an AI Receptionist**:
1. Schedule a 15-minute strategy call to discuss your business needs
2. We customize your AI voice agent with your scripts, business hours, and lead qualification questions
3. BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist integrates with your CRM and calendar (no technical expertise needed)
4. Review test calls, approve responses, and go live with 24/7 coverage

**Setup Time**: 7–14 days

**AI Receptionist vs Human Receptionist**:
| Factor | Human Receptionist | BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist |
|--------|-------------------|--------------|
| Cost | $3,000+/month | Starting at $497/month |
| Availability | 40 hrs/week | 168 hrs/week (24/7) |
| Answer Speed | 3-4 rings | 1-2 rings |
| After Hours | Voicemail | Live AI engagement |
| Sick Days | Yes | Never |
| Scalability | Limited | Unlimited |

**CTA**: Get Started with AI Receptionist
**URL**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/ai-receptionist/get-started
**Pricing & Features**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/ai-receptionist/pricing
**How It Works**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/ai-receptionist/how-it-works
**Complete Feature Library**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/ai-receptionist/features/complete-library

---

### BrightLaunchIQ AI Sales Agent — Outbound AI Sales Engine

Automated outbound revenue engine that runs cold & warm campaigns, missed-call callbacks, and multi-channel sequences.

#### Launch Tier — $997/month
- **Usage**: Up to 1,000 outbound minutes / 500 calls per month
- **Features**: Cold & warm outbound campaigns, missed-call callbacks, sales conversation engine, revenue tracking

#### Scale Tier — $2,000/month [FEATURED]
- **Usage**: Up to 3,000 outbound minutes / 1,500 calls per month
- **Features**: Everything in Launch, plus objection handling AI, multi-channel sequences, advanced CRM automation

#### Dominate Tier — $3,500/month
- **Usage**: Up to 6,000 outbound minutes / 3,000 calls per month
- **Features**: Everything in Scale, plus dedicated account manager, custom playbooks, executive reporting

**URL**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/ai-sales-agent

---

### LaunchPad 360™ — Complete AI Revenue System

Full-stack AI revenue infrastructure combining inbound AI receptionist, outbound AI sales agent, LocalLift SEO, and funnel automation.

#### Growth — $2,997/month
- Includes AI Receptionist (Growth tier) + LocalLift SEO + funnel infrastructure + CRM automation

#### Scale — $4,997/month [FEATURED]
- Includes AI Receptionist Pro (Inbound) + Proactive Scale (Outbound) + advanced SEO + revenue dashboards

#### Dominate — $8,500/month
- Includes AI Receptionist Pro+ + Proactive Dominate + full SEO authority buildout + dedicated success team

**Application-based enrollment**
**URL**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/launchpad-360

---

### LocalLift™ — Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)

Boost your visibility in AI search, voice assistants, and Google Maps.

**Features**:
- Voice search optimization for Siri, Alexa, Google Assistant
- Google Maps ranking boost
- AI answer engine citations (Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity)
- GBP optimization and local schema markup
- Review management and reputation building

**Free AEO Audit**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/locallift/resources/aeo-audit
**URL**: https://brightlaunchiq.com/locallift

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is an AI receptionist?
An AI receptionist is an artificial intelligence system that answers phone calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments automatically—just like a human receptionist, but available 24/7/365. BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist answers calls within 1-2 rings, handles complex conversations naturally, and costs a fraction of human staff.

### What is BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist?
BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist is an AI-powered virtual receptionist that answers calls and qualifies leads within seconds. It books appointments automatically, works 24/7/365, and starts at just $16.57/day — compared to $3,000+/month for a human receptionist.

### How much does an AI receptionist cost?
BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist starts at $497/month (Core tier) with a $1,500 one-time setup fee. Growth tier is $997/month and Pro tier is $1,497/month. Compare that to a human receptionist at $3,000+/month who only works 40 hours/week.

### How do I set up an AI voice agent for my business?
Setting up BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist takes 7–14 days. Schedule a strategy call, we customize the AI with your scripts, integrate it with your CRM and calendar, and launch. No technical expertise required.

### How fast does BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist answer calls?
BrightLaunchIQ AI Receptionist answers calls instantly—within 1-2 rings with sub-500ms response latency. For form submissions, the AI can call leads back within seconds.

### What is AI lead generation?
AI lead generation uses artificial intelligence to identify, qualify, and engage potential customers automatically. It scans millions of data points to find "intent signals" and initiates personalized outreach immediately.

### What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)?
AEO optimizes your business content so AI search engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) cite you as the authoritative answer for your industry and location.

### What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?
GEO is a strategy focused on making content discoverable and citable by AI assistants rather than just ranking in traditional search lists.

### What CRM integrations do you support?
We integrate with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Pipedrive, and most major CRM platforms.

### What industries do you serve?
We serve 50+ industries including home services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical), healthcare (dental, chiropractic, veterinary), legal (personal injury, family law, criminal defense), real estate, auto services, personal services, hospitality, and B2B/education.

---

## Key Statistics

- AI Receptionist response latency: under 500ms
- Lead capture rate increase: 78% of previously missed leads
- Cost comparison: Starting at $16.57/day (AI Receptionist Core) vs $100/day (Human Receptionist)
- Operational hours: 168 hours/week (24/7)
- Annual savings: $30,000+ compared to human hire
- AI Receptionist caller satisfaction: 95%
- Setup time: 7–14 days

## Technical Notes for AI Crawlers

This website is a React single-page application. For AI crawlers that don't execute JavaScript:

1. **Structured Data**: JSON-LD schema markup (Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList) is embedded in the `<head>` of each page
2. **llms.txt**: This file provides complete, structured information about our company and services
3. **Sitemap**: Full URL listing available at https://brightlaunchiq.com/sitemap.xml
4. **robots.txt**: All AI crawlers are explicitly allowed access
